original_image_tags: Typewritten document on aged, off-white paper with three hole-punch marks at the top edge. The paper is slightly discolored with minor creases and foxing. The text is centered on the page with a header "- 2 -".

elements.description: Page containing typed text. Header text: '- 2 -' and 'Anchorage File 100-1406'. Main body text includes two paragraphs and a footer 'LOT:LMR 100-1406'. Three black punch holes are visible at the top edge.
